race.comment: SOMEWHERE SOON (6) made it two on the bounce last time out when digging deep to score by a nose over 1800m here. Will relish the rise to 2000m and keeps Holder, who will need to be smart from the wide draw. On her way through and looks another great chance. MORTHAN EFFICIENT (5) backs up quickly after finishing in the money over this trip at Wangaratta. Also has the wide draw to contend but is worth following up. SAVSONIC (8) bounced back sharply last start but still found one better over a similar trip on the Parks surface, only beaten a long neck. Another sticky draw to overcome but she's got enough speed to do so. JUST A BROTHER (4) saluted two runs ago then turned in a strong effort in the Port Lincoln Cup when only beaten a nose. This looks a bit tougher but he gets in well with the claim and warrants safe keeping. CLASSY CLARET (3) isn't doing much wrong and is another that is worth including dropping back to a winning trip.
